notes: Backfilled 2026-05-21 from the reality-check bridge plan.

Marked verdict=pending because no signed corpus run with a real observed_pct has been emitted yet. The lockstep harness can produce one with `franken-node verify lockstep <corpus> --runtimes node,bun,franken-node --emit-fixtures`, but Node and Bun must both be installed on the runner.

Once the first real corpus run lands, populate observed_pct, set passed accordingly, and flip verdict to GREEN/RED. The gate-tier (G0..G4) ratcheting model lives in docs/specs/section_13/bd-28sz_contract.md.
This file is the README-referenced artifact at docs/CLAIMS_REGISTRY.md::CLAIM-001 and docs/PRODUCT_CHARTER.md §5.
